production_rights_note: Prototype/internal recording batch only unless voice source rights are clean, licensed, or consented.
runtime_rule: Play the shortest honest cached line matching the deterministic service state; queue generated/deterministic answer body behind it.
global_safety_rules: Do not imply Scarlett has transferred a call, contacted a person, sent a link, submitted a form, booked, reserved, confirmed availability, or checked live seats.
Do not record long deterministic facts in this batch; keep addresses, distances, schedules, course catalogues, and availability generated from local layers.
Keep wording in vous form for customer-facing French consistency.

lines.text_fr_ca: Bonjour, je suis Scarlett.
lines.delivery_note: warm, concise, receptionist calm; no sales brightness
lines.safety_note: Use as a short reusable opener only; do not replace deterministic factual answer bodies.
